titles.title: My Life is in Your hands

authors.author: Richard Cimino
Richard Cimino
Die Hände durchbohrt (Meine Liebe ist Dein)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You don't have to worry And don't you be afraid Joy comes in the morning Troubles they don't last always For there's a friend in Jesus Who will wipe your tears away And if your heart is broken Just lift your hands and say

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh I know that I can make it I know that I can stand No matter what may come my way My life is in your hands

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With Jesus I can take it With Him I know I can stand No matter what may come my way My life is in your hands

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So when your tests and trials They seem to get you down And all your friends and loved ones Are nowhere to be found Remember there's a friend in Jesus Who will wipe your tears away And if you heart is broken Just lift your hands and say

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh I know that I can make it I know that I can stand No matter what may come my way My life is in your hands

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: With Jesus I can take it With Him I know I can stand No matter what may come my way My life is in your hands
